visual_description: A lone figure stands with his back to the camera in a dim stone corridor lined with tall pillars, then turns to face forward, revealing a young man with dark hair, round glasses, and a brown jacket over a blue shirt. He looks straight ahead with a neutral expression, his posture upright and his gaze fixed. The setting is a shadowy, ancient hall with muted lighting.
